text.title: BA Knowledge Areas Overview Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end walked example applying the knowledge-areas-overview methodology, producing a valid artefact per `02-output-contract.xml`.

section.title: End-to-end example
section.narrative: Sponsor asks 'how do we structure stakeholder workshops?' → KAL1-0007 routes to KA-2 → next methodology: elicitation-techniques.

section.title: Resulting artefact
